data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution links and conversion tracking windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Attribution links and conversion tracking windows', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for these elements, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to attribution links or conversion tracking windows. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of validation for attribution links and conversion tracking windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
